description: Raycast is a macOS launcher and productivity application with an extension platform and a private extension store for teams. Developers use its tooling to build and publish extensions that run inside the Raycast app.
summary: Raycast exposes a developer CLI (`ray` via `@raycast/api`) for building and publishing Raycast extensions; no public HTTP, GraphQL, or MCP developer surface on `raycast.com` was confirmed.
